name: Punchy Guy
author: Poki
description: Punchy Guy is an action game where you throw powerful punches to ragdoll enemies out of your way. Tap to extend your fist and send opponents flying with satisfying KO physics. From quick jabs to devastating uppercuts, time your strikes to smash through waves of challengers. Every hit lands with impact. How many can you knock out? How do I play Punchy Guy? Click with your mouse to hit the enemies. Who created Punchy Guy? Punchy Guy is created by Finz Games. Play their other games on Poki: Connect Puzzle , Indoor Soccer and Karate Fighter ! How can I play Punchy Guy for free? You can play Punchy Guy for free on Poki. Can I play Punchy Guy on mobile devices and desktop? Punchy Guy can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
